title: SPBR x Fresh Animations
description:
Unofficial compatibility patch for the vanilla SPBR textures and Fresh Animation models. 

Make them love each other!
body:
# SPBR x Fresh Animations

[SPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr) by [NyaShulker](https://modrinth.com/user/NyaShulker), the [VNR](https://github.com/Poudingue/Vanilla-Normals-Renewed) successor, is a vanilla like PBR texture pack that provides a nice materials and relief for the vanilla textures and shaders. 
[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) is a resource pack by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX), that changes entity models to provide cool animations and extra details. 

Hovewer, if you want to use both of them, you may notice some graphical artifacts, such as missing eye animations, missing textures, wrong color palette, etc. 
And that is when my mod is needed!

I recommend you to use the next load order to be sure everything is loaded correctly:
![Load order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5172fbae03bcae91f506fd038ad1a366d13f81a8.png)

For the [Fresh Animations: Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions) you need [SPBR x Fresh Animations: Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr-x-fresh-animations-extensions). 
This is an addon for this mod to make it compatible with the **Extensions** that provides extra details for the animated models. 
I tried to limit myself to just one mod, but some things are incompatible between **Fresh Animations** and **Fresh Animations: Extensions**. 

So, this small patch will be handy!
